---
title: "[R is for <br>Authoring!!]{.shadowsharp}" 
author: 'OOH Session #124...<br>[Conference<br>Posters (I)]{.revolttit .Bigger}'
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: ../../../img/poster.png
#  data-background-opacity: ".4"
format: 
  revealjs:
    mouse-wheel: true              
    slide-tone: false
    transition: convex
    transition-speed: slow
    code-overflow: wrap              ## has never "worked"
    theme: ../../../css/theming2026.scss 
    logo: https://www.i2clipart.com/cliparts/e/b/4/6/clipart-affiche-poster-256x256-eb46.png   #https://www.pngplay.com/wp-content/uploads/14/Pink-Panther-Thinking-Transparent-Images.png
    footer-logo-link: "https://github.com/jtkulas/LiveStreams"  ## https://github.com/shafayetShafee/reveal-header#readme
    preview-links: false      ## true brings up iframe window instead of "site"
    code-annotations: hover   ## select
engine: knitr                 ## not picking up inline codes
filters: 
  - reveal-header
execute: 
  eval: false       ## for fenced code 
  echo: true
---

## Open Office Hours <br>(`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) 

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="55%"}
+ Recap session #123
+ Today's topic(s):
    + [[Conference Posters (I)]{.revolt .bigger}](https://colinpurrington.com/tips/poster-design/)
+ Shared problem-solving

::: {.callout-note}
## Reminder -- check it out!! {{< iconify emojione-v1:blue-book >}}{{< iconify emojione-v1:green-book >}}
Fantastic [{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}} resource!! ](https://qmd4sci.njtierney.com/) 
:::

:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

:::

:::

::: {.absolute style="top: 185px; right: -120px; width:550px;"}
<a href="https://jtkulas.github.io/LiveStreams/slides/2026/3_31_26">
  <img src="/img/title123.JPG">
</a>
:::

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/previews/015/241/249/non_2x/glowing-neon-arrow-doodle-transparent-free-png.png){.absolute top="165" left="385" width="200"}

# Recap of Session <br>#123: 

![](https://pngimg.com/d/sticky_note_PNG18952.png){.absolute right="50" top="200"}

![](https://wallpapers.com/images/hd/looney-tunes-characters-spotlight-2160733rt9058jno.jpg){.absolute width="150" top="230" right="85"}

## [Text Animations]{.risque .biggeR}

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Quarto Reveal{{< iconify vscode-icons:file-type-js-official >}} Slides

Several built--in animations intended only for Reveal{{< iconify vscode-icons:file-type-js-official >}} slides & [referred to in documentation as "fragments"](https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/advanced.html#fragments"):

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="42%" .smaller}

[.fade-out]{.fragment .fade-out fragment-index=1}

[.strike]{.fragment .strike fragment-index=2}

[.highlight-green]{.fragment .highlight-green fragment-index=3}

[.fade-in-then-semi-out]{.fragment .fade-in-then-semi-out fragment-index=4}

:::

::: {.column width="40%"}

::: {.fragment .shrink .highlight-current-red fragment-index=5}
.shrink + ***.highlight-current-red***
:::

::: {.fragment .grow .highlight-blue fragment-index=6}
.highlight-blue<br>+ .grow
:::

:::

::: {.column width="30%"}

:::

:::

![](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNTljemF4dDhiaGtsejlrMzd3Mnh0NzZyaHdxMjlxdnJ3N3RjZmwxeCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/HwGAKG8Z00F1wloAfQ/giphy.gif){.absolute right="-100" bottom="30" height="250"}

### Extension for {{< iconify devicon:html5-wordmark >}}

[`quarto-animate`](https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-animate) works with all {{< iconify devicon:html5-wordmark >}} files -- [extensive capabilities](https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-animate?tab=readme-ov-file#animation-effects) 

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="33%"}

+ {{< animate bounce "Bouncy-Bouncy" delay=0s repeat=infinite >}}
+ {{< animate flash "Flashy-Flashy" delay=0s repeat=infinite >}}
+ {{< animate shakeY "Shake Y" delay=0s repeat=infinite >}}

:::

::: {.column width="30%"}

+ {{< animate jello "Jello" delay=0s repeat=infinite >}}
+ {{< animate rubberBand "Rubber Band" delay=0s repeat=infinite >}} 
+ {{< animate swing "Swing" delay=0s repeat=infinite >}}

:::

::: {.column width="36%"}

+ {{< animate tada "Tada!" delay=0s repeat=infinite >}}
+ {{< animate wobble "Wobble" delay=0s repeat=infinite >}} 
+ {{< animate heartBeat "Heartbeat" delay=0s repeat=infinite >}}

:::

:::

![](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbTBiYWI0ZDVpaHNudWE0ZWhnenMzNndnazNhN3A5Ymhjc2hydjU1YyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/InDHoW8hBWXIihMVtZ/giphy.gif){.absolute right="-150" bottom="170" height="200"}

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/thumbnails/071/848/048/small/flat-design-dazed-emoticon-round-face-with-spiral-eyes-symbol-graphic-png.png){.absolute height="120" bottom="230" left="500" .tilt2}

:::

![](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNXlubTY3NjBhZWxvbWFqNzI4aG85Z3AwY244ZGszbml4bmV0MXN3MSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/0TK5JyuTqSfTxVTOwf/giphy.gif){.absolute right="-150" top="0" height="250"}

# Today...

![](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNjR1bGlpMnN0c3d5NzduM2JsZ3dyOXlzeHQwb2hqbmVrMzZiNzdvYiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/0xCUGn70qR9m8l6n7e/giphy.gif)

## [[Conference Posters (I)]{.revolt .bigger}](https://colinpurrington.com/tips/poster-design/)

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="55%"}

### {{< iconify file-icons:rmarkdown style="color:#82b1ff;" >}} Options:

::: {.Smaller}

+ [`posterdown`](https://github.com/brentthorne/posterdown) -- {{< iconify uiw:github style="color:#ffffff;" >}}/CRAN archive, 2 styles css--modified with backend .pdf capability via `pagedown:: chrome_print()`

+ [`postr`](https://github.com/odeleongt/postr) -- flexdashboard with [screenshot]{.underline} to .pdf

+ $\LaTeX$ templates ([`beamerposter`]( https://github.com/deselaers/latex-beamerposter); [`tikzposter`](ttps://ctan.org/pkg/tikzposter); [`a0poster`](https://ctan.org/pkg/a0poster)) -- specify `template:` within [YAML]{.ranchers2}

:::

:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

::: {.fragment .semi-fade-out}

### {{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}} Options:

::: {.Smaller}

+ [Typst template](https://github.com/quarto-ext/typst-templates/tree/main/poster) -- built--in to base distribution ({{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}}1.4+)

+ [quarto_poster](https://github.com/higgi13425/quarto_poster) -- [will need to fork]{.underline} {{< iconify uiw:github style="color:#ffffff;" >}} repo (not an extension)

+ User templates ([peace-of-posters](https://github.com/jonaspleyer/peace-of-posters); [typst-poster](https://github.com/pncnmnp/typst-poster)) -- specify `template.typ` or `quarto use template`

:::

:::

:::

:::

![](https://cdn.pixabay.com/photo/2016/07/31/20/56/presentation-1559937_1280.png){.absolute right="-100" top="-30" height="250"}

![](https://freepngimg.com/save/14604-presentation-transparent/300x300){.absolute left="-170" bottom="260" height="200"}

## {{< iconify file-icons:rmarkdown size=2x style="color:#82b1ff;" >}} Session Info (`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) Rendering: 
```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
sessionInfo()
```
